title: Ayutthaya、Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya — 生活成本、住房与搬迁指南 [2026]
description: Ayutthaya、Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya的完整指南：生活成本、房价、社区、远程工作准备情况和搬迁建议。
content:
概述

Ayutthaya是Phra Nakhon Si Ayutthaya的一个城市，人口约80,000。A UNESCO World Heritage city just north of Bangkok, rich in history with ancient temple ruins, and offering a much more affordable lifestyle than the capital.

Last updated: July 20, 2026
